etymology.description: Depicts a wooden bifurcated plow with two cross lines -> simplified to two lines -> depicts a plow or harrow
etymology.interpretation: 耒 is a pictogram representing the fundamental design of an ancient agricultural tool, specifically a plow or harrow, conveying its function through the depiction of its shape. The original complexity with three cross lines was reduced to emphasize the essential elements, capturing the tool's utility in cultivation tasks.
